title: Powerplex Spyglass
description: replaces the GUI of the spyglass with the title card from invincible.
body:
WHY DOES SPYGLASS NEVER PAY FOR HIS CRIMES!!??

 

replaces the GUI of the spyglass with the title card from invincible.

When you use a spyglass, your screen looks like this:
![sc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dZOo3oqb/images/437e9c18a03ec821de3fe52afb7c791e72387f01.png)

It plays the sound and everything!

[![Affiliate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a4883838950998d67143440012948c2410ff03.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3131)
